productDisplayName: Urban Yoga Men's Suryanamaskar Red T-shirt
description: CompositionRed round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with chest print, flattened seam and printed labelFittingComfortWash care Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees) Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Do not iron on print Salute the sun for a great start to your day in this red tee from urban yoga. The graphic on the front depicts the progression of the surya namaskar asana in case you forget. A stitched label has been carefully avoided and replaced with a printed label to provide absolute comfort. Seams around the sides have been flattened with special care to avoid abrasion. Team this t-shirt with yoga pants for a rejuvenating exercise session or wear it with jeans as casual wear.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.2”, Shoulders-19"
